attributes.current_summary: The local secret-like residue still exists at repo root.
Representative same-MVE reproducibility is proven, but general current-head clean-clone equivalence is still not claimed.
Readiness scoping remains narrowed away from generated and quarantined surfaces.
Historical archive material still sits at the repo root and under docs/audit.
The stale-truth problem was transformed into explicit evidence-vs-subject typing rather than hidden tracked-state overread.
The six-zone trust model remains resolved and later runtime-boundary work hardened it further.
The external-path acceptance repair remains part of the retained tool/test surface.
